title: Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections

'''''Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections''''' is the second installment of the ''[[Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' series of reference books published by [[Dorling Kindersley]] on [[May 10]], [[1999]]. Written by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]] and illustrated by [[Hans Jenssen]] and [[Richard Chasemore]], the book provides in-depth cross-sections and illustrations of over a dozen [[Starship/Legends|starships]] and vehicles from the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], including the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]], [[Tribubble bongo/Legends|tribubble bongo]], [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]], and [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]]. The book's content was later republished in [[2007]] as part of ''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]'', a compilation of the entire Cross-Sections series.

*[[C-9979 landing craft/Legends|Landing Ship]]

*Anakin & Sebulba's Podracers
*[[Scimitar/Legends|Sith Infilitrator]]
*[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Droid Starfighter]]

*[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AAT (Battle Tank)]]
*[[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Naboo]] [[V-19 landspeeder|Speeders]]
*[[EasyRide passenger airspeeder/Legends|Coruscant Taxi]]
